Uses of Class
com.irurueta.units.Measurement

      Classes in com.irurueta.units with type parameters of type Measurement 
      Modifier and Type Class Description
      class  MeasureFormatter<M extends Measurement<U>,​U extends java.lang.Enum<?>>
      Base class to format and parse a given measure using its value and unit.

      Methods in com.irurueta.units with parameters of type Measurement 
      Modifier and Type Method Description
      boolean Acceleration.equals​(Measurement<AccelerationUnit> other, double tolerance)
      Determines if two accelerations are equal up to a certain tolerance.
      boolean Angle.equals​(Measurement<AngleUnit> other, double tolerance)
      Determines if two angles are equal up to a certain tolerance.
      boolean AngularAcceleration.equals​(Measurement<AngularAccelerationUnit> other, double tolerance)
      Determines if two angular acceleration values are equal up to a certain tolerance.
      boolean AngularSpeed.equals​(Measurement<AngularSpeedUnit> other, double tolerance)
      Determines if two angular speed values are equal up to a certain tolerance.
      boolean Distance.equals​(Measurement<DistanceUnit> other, double tolerance)
      Determines if two distances are equal up to a certain tolerance.
      boolean Frequency.equals​(Measurement<FrequencyUnit> other, double tolerance)
      Determines if two frequencies are equal up to a certain tolerance.
      boolean MagneticFluxDensity.equals​(Measurement<MagneticFluxDensityUnit> other, double tolerance)
      Determines if two magnetic flux densities are equal up to a certain tolerance.
      boolean Measurement.equals​(Measurement<T> other, double tolerance)
      Determines if two measurements are equal up to a certain tolerance.
      boolean Speed.equals​(Measurement<SpeedUnit> other, double tolerance)
      Determines if two speeds are equal up to a certain tolerance.
      boolean Surface.equals​(Measurement<SurfaceUnit> other, double tolerance)
      Determines if two surfaces are equal up to a certain tolerance.
      boolean Temperature.equals​(Measurement<TemperatureUnit> other, double tolerance)
      Determines if two temperatures are equal up to a certain tolerance.
      boolean Time.equals​(Measurement<TimeUnit> other, double tolerance)
      Determines if two time instances are equal up to a certain tolerance.
      boolean Volume.equals​(Measurement<VolumeUnit> other, double tolerance)
      Determine if two volumes are equal up to a certain tolerance.
      boolean Weight.equals​(Measurement<WeightUnit> other, double tolerance)
      Determines if two weights are equal up to a certain tolerance.
